_comment: Copy this file to sync_to_zed.config.json (which is gitignored) and edit.
Each entry is matched EXACTLY against the cwd field stored in Claude session jsonl files.
- Strings containing '/' or starting with '~' are treated as full paths.
- Other strings are matched against the project's directory basename (case-insensitive).
An empty 'projects' list (or a missing config file) means sync ALL projects.
Override this list at runtime with: sync_to_zed.py -p PROJECT [-p PROJECT ...]
